export.description: Download a full copy of the project as JSON. It includes characters, notes, map markers, timeline, tags, and links. You can import the file back from the home page.

dangerZone.hint: Deleting a project is permanent. We recommend exporting a backup first.

confirm.deleteMessage: Delete "{{name}}"? All data will be removed: characters, notes, maps, and timeline. This cannot be undone.
